name: korea-invest
description: 한국투자증권 OPEN API 통합 sysmod — 278 REST API + 9 도메인 (국내주식: 계좌/시세/순위/시세분석/ELW + 선물옵션·채권·해외주식·해외선물옵션). 도메인별 별도 LLM 도구로 노출.

actionCatalog.envelope: { "action": "<id>", "query": { <query.* params> }, "body": { <body.* params> } } — param key prefix query./body. marks the location

FID_INPUT_ISCD.resolveHint: A 6-digit domestic stock code (FID_INPUT_ISCD) must come from a lookup, never from memory. Resolve a company name to its code with the dart module {action:lookup, query:<name>} — it returns the official corp_name + stock_code in one call (e.g. 이노칩 -> 모다이노칩 / 080420); the resolved code then works here in the same conversation. If the user gave a raw code, confirm it first (dart lookup of the company, or kiwoom ka10100). If several companies match, present a picker (suggest). Index/sector codes (0001 코스피, 1001 코스닥) and member-firm codes are fixed reference codes and are not gated.

PDNO.resolveHint: A 6-digit order/holdings stock code (PDNO) must come from a lookup or the user, never invented — a wrong code means trading the wrong stock. Resolve a company name to its code via dart {action:lookup}, or confirm a given code first; the resolved code then works. Bond/product codes (KR...) are not affected.

ws._note: 한투 실시간 — approval_key(구독 헤더) + positional(^) 프레임. 시세=평문(flag0)/체결통보=AES256(flag1, 구독 응답 iv·key). field 순서는 _ws_apis.json responseBody(trId 매칭).
